name: Cracker Barrel Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the Bisquick and buttermilk until a smooth dough forms.
2. Use your hands to knead the dough in a bowl until it is smooth and elastic.
3. Shape the dough into 16 thin patties, stacking them 8 at a time on an ungreased 9-inch round baking pan.
4. Bake at 450°F for 16 to 18 minutes, or until golden brown.
5. Wipe the tops with butter immediately after baking.
6. To make BONANZA Copycats, add 4 teaspoons of sugar before shaping into 6 patties that are 1-inch thick and 3-inches in diameter. Arrange them close together on the ungreased round baking pan.
7. Wipe the tops with soft butter before baking at 450°F for an additional 18 minutes, or until browned.
8. Allow to cool for 10 minutes before serving. Split the biscuits with your thumbs rather than using a knife.
9. These do not keep well; wipe the tops again with small amounts of butter right out of the oven to maintain a soft and tender surface.
